summary: Comprehensive testing of Rangkul MVP completed. Backend: 29/29 pytest tests pass covering auth (register both roles, login, /me, invalid token), experts list/detail, appointments (create/list/accept/complete with balance increment), messages thread + chats list, moods, journals, profile update, online toggle, working hours, withdrawals (RBAC + balance decrement) and expert stats. Verified no _id leakage, bcrypt password hashing (wrong-password=401), 401 on missing/invalid bearer. Frontend (Expo web on mobile viewport 390x844): Login/Register render; role-based routing places patient on points/mood/services home and expert on stats/status home; full booking flow works (services -> experts list -> expert detail with date/time/method/payment -> Konfirmasi Pemesanan double-confirmation modal -> Bayar Sekarang -> appointment created with 'Menunggu' status on Jadwal). Theme picker on Profile changes app colors and persists across reload via AsyncStorage key 'rangkul.theme' (verified rose persists). Logout clears token and returns to /login. testIDs are present throughout (mood-happy, service-pribadi, theme-rose, logout-button, etc.). No red screens, no page errors, no broken images.

minor.issue: passlib trapped warning 'error reading bcrypt version' (AttributeError: module 'bcrypt' has no attribute '__about__') due to newer bcrypt lib; non-blocking, hashing/verification works correctly.
Pydantic EmailStr rejects .test TLD as 'special-use/reserved'. Test creds in /app/memory/test_credentials.md use @rangkul.test which will 422. Recommend switching docs to @rangkul.com.

issues: Console warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' from RN Web - cosmetic only.

react_native_issues.issue: Expo CLI warns expo@54.0.34 should be ~54.0.35, expo-font@14.0.11 -> ~14.0.12, expo-router@6.0.23 -> ~6.0.24. Bundles fine but recommend `npx expo install --check` then `--fix`.

action_items: Update /app/memory/test_credentials.md to use a non-reserved TLD (e.g. @rangkul.com) so suggested credentials pass Pydantic EmailStr validation.
Optional: run `cd /app/frontend && npx expo install --check --fix` to align expo / expo-font / expo-router patch versions.
Optional: silence passlib bcrypt warning by pinning `bcrypt<4` or upgrading to `passlib>=1.7.5` once released.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~460 lines and still cohesive; consider splitting into routers (auth/users/appointments/messages/moods/journals/withdrawals) once it grows past ~700 lines.

POST /api/auth/register seeds lat/lng using `hash(uid)` which depends on Python's PYTHONHASHSEED and yields essentially random non-geographic coords - acceptable for demo but document or replace with proper city geocoding.

PATCH /api/appointments/{id}/status has no patient/expert authorization gate for patient role; any authenticated patient could potentially change status of their own appointment (e.g. set to 'completed' bypassing expert). Add role-aware checks: only experts may set accepted/rejected/completed.
JWT_SECRET defaults to a hard-coded dev string if env var missing - acceptable here but flag for prod hardening.
/api/chats aggregation loads up to 1000 messages and looks up peers one-by-one in a loop; acceptable for MVP, but consider $group + $lookup pipeline for scale.
seed_data_creation: Created throwaway test users prefixed with TEST_/random suffix via /api/auth/register; no fixed seed inserted into DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_rangkul_api.py is fully passing. Frontend testIDs available: notification-bell, points-card, mood-{happy,neutral,sad}, service-{pribadi,pasangan,karir,nearby}, theme-{teal,rose,blue,purple}, menu-{edit,journal,assessment,help}, logout-button, toast-host. AsyncStorage keys are 'rangkul.token' and 'rangkul.theme'. Register endpoint rejects .test TLD - use @rangkul.com.
rca_of_issue: N/A - no functional bugs found. Only minor housekeeping items (test cred TLD, expo version pin, passlib warning, patient-side status authorization).
